javadoc_before:
/** * Implementations of this interface are responsible for determining * configuration used for creating {@link Launcher} instances via {@link LauncherFactory}. * *

Example

* * 
 * import static org.junit.platform.launcher.core.*;
 * // ...
 *
 *   LauncherConfig.builder()
 *     .setTestEngineAutoRegistrationEnabled(true)
 *     .setTestExecutionListenerAutoRegistrationEnabled(true)
 *     .addAdditionalTestEngines(new CustomTestEngine())
 *     .addAdditionalTestExecutionListeners(new CustomTestExecutionListener())
 *     .build();
 *
* * @see Launcher * @see LauncherFactory * @since 1.3 */
javadoc_after:
/** * {@code LauncherConfig} defines the configuration API for creating * {@link Launcher} instances via the {@link LauncherFactory}. * *

Example

* * 
 * LauncherConfig launcherConfig = LauncherConfig.builder()
 *   .enableTestEngineAutoRegistration(false)
 *   .enableTestExecutionListenerAutoRegistration(false)
 *   .addTestEngines(new CustomTestEngine())
 *   .addTestExecutionListeners(new CustomTestExecutionListener())
 *   .build();
 *
 * Launcher launcher = LauncherFactory.create(launcherConfig);
 * LauncherDiscoveryRequest discoveryRequest = ...
 * launcher.execute(discoveryRequest);
 *
* * @see #builder() * @see Launcher * @see LauncherFactory * @since 1.3 */
